# BP-82 negative: location-aware parsing is explicit for both supported shapes.
lang: go
file: BP-82-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "time"

// ParseDate parses a wall-clock value using the caller's location.
func ParseDate(value string, location *time.Location) (time.Time, error) {
	local, err := time.ParseInLocation("2006-01-02 15:04:05", value, location)
	if err != nil {
		return time.Time{}, err
	}
	return local, nil
}
